query_string.query: event.dataset:system.application AND message:*stopped* AND NOT event.provider:Microsoft-Windows-User* AND NOT event.provider:Microsoft-Windows-CertificationAuthority

script.source: 'Service stopped: [Host: ' + doc['host.name'].value + ', Provider: ' + doc['event.provider'].value + ', EventCode: ' + doc['event.code'].value + ']'
